response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, senior-level engineer with genuine relevant signals — prior work on a C-based IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI) and self-built language tooling (a D test runner and assertion library) show real interest in IDE internals and tooling. However, the core required stack is largely absent: Java appears only in passing on older projects, there is no Kotlin or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and no demonstrated deep JVM expertise. The bulk of recent work is TypeScript/Node and DLang, which is a poor match for an enterprise JVM IDE role.
strengths: Direct IDE internals experience building C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI
Demonstrated language-tooling passion: authored a D test runner and assertion library
Senior engineer with broad, deep systems experience including low-latency high-throughput services
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/enterprise-framework experience as required
Java exposure is minimal and dated; no evidence of deep JVM understanding
Recent focus (TS/Node, DLang) is misaligned with the JVM tooling mandate

key_factors.factor: Strong general senior engineering track record
